projectDescription: Freesolo helps enterprise teams build, evaluate, train, and deploy product-native AI models and features that perform reliably in production.
keyFeatures: Product-native AI model building for enterprise workflows
Instrumentation: capture real feature behavior and user context
Evaluation framework: measure quality against latency, cost, reliability, and output quality
Reinforcement learning and supervised fine-tuning pipelines
Continuous production improvement with live feedback loops
ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type I, and SOC 2 Type II compliance
US-based infrastructure with high availability SLAs
Google and GitHub SSO with email/password authentication
publicApiSurface: Account authentication (Google SSO, GitHub SSO, email/password)
Project configuration (model settings, eval definitions, deployment settings)
